sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cat > /tmp/peek_outcome.py <<EOF
import json, glob, collections, statistics
for base in ["/home/ec2-user/platform/data/stage3-claude", "/home/ec2-user/platform/data/stage3-llama"]:
    files = sorted(glob.glob(base + "/*/cases/*.json"))
    if not files:
        continue
    print("===", base, "total:", len(files), "===")
    outc = collections.Counter()
    op_total = collections.Counter()
    op_succ = collections.Counter()
    base_total = 0
    base_succ = 0
    durations = []
    steps_l = []
    tokens_l = []
    for fp in files:
        try:
            d = json.load(open(fp))
        except Exception:
            continue
        t = d.get("trace") or {}
        outcome = t.get("outcome") or "unknown"
        outc[outcome] += 1
        succ = bool(t.get("success"))
        cid = d.get("caseId", "")
        # caseId format: {app}:individual:{taskId}:{ci}:{attempt}:{opIds}
        parts = cid.split(":")
        op = parts[-1] if len(parts) >= 6 else "?"
        op_total[op] += 1
        if succ:
            op_succ[op] += 1
        if t.get("durationMs") is not None:
            durations.append(t["durationMs"] / 1000.0)
        if t.get("totalSteps") is not None:
            steps_l.append(t["totalSteps"])
        if t.get("totalTokens") is not None:
            tokens_l.append(t["totalTokens"])
    print("outcomes:", dict(outc))
    succ_total = op_succ.total() if hasattr(op_succ, "total") else sum(op_succ.values())
    total_cases = sum(op_total.values())
    print("overall success rate: {}/{} = {:.1%}".format(succ_total, total_cases, succ_total/total_cases if total_cases else 0))
    if durations:
        print("duration sec  p50 {:.1f}  p90 {:.1f}  max {:.1f}".format(statistics.median(durations), sorted(durations)[int(len(durations)*0.9)], max(durations)))
    if steps_l:
        print("steps  p50 {:.1f}  p90 {:.0f}  max {}".format(statistics.median(steps_l), sorted(steps_l)[int(len(steps_l)*0.9)], max(steps_l)))
    if tokens_l:
        print("tokens (per case, includes history accumulation)  p50 {:,.0f}  p90 {:,.0f}  max {:,}".format(statistics.median(tokens_l), sorted(tokens_l)[int(len(tokens_l)*0.9)], max(tokens_l)))
    print()
    # Per-operator success
    print("per-operator (sorted by success rate ascending):")
    rows = []
    for op in sorted(op_total):
        rows.append((op_succ[op]/op_total[op], op, op_succ[op], op_total[op]))
    for r, op, ns, nt in sorted(rows):
        print("  {:<6}  {:>3}/{:<3}  {:>5.1%}".format(op, ns, nt, r))
    print()
EOF
python3.11 /tmp/peek_outcome.py'
